title: Views and Brews
summary:
The next morning we got up early and headed into Sisters, Oregon in search of coffee and breakfast. We found both and walked around the cute little town, window shopping. Our friend Tiffany from Missoula was meeting us in Bend that day so we met up at a brewery to get a little work done and wait for her. We spent the evening walking around Bend, where we got some good Thai food and gelato! It was our first time there and we really liked the town, it was reminiscent of Missoula with the river running through it.

We spent the next morning hiking up Tumalo Mountain, situated right across from Mt. Bachelor. We ran into a little snow at the top, but had views of the Three Sisters Mountains. This whole area of Oregon is pretty wild because everywhere you look, there is a big majestic mountain popping up out of the landscape. As an after-hike treat, we stopped at Deschutes Brewery, where we all got a shandy.

-Helen

photos.caption: The view from the top of Tumalo Mountain
